install_only.derivation: project python/install/** from verified full to python/**; exclude python/PYTHON.json and python/build/**

install_only_stripped.derivation: from verified install_only only; record every ELF before/after identity; allow explicit producer-already-stripped alias mode

build_area.meaning: truthful upstream-derived input, project adaptation, mutation, audit, license, and qualification records; not a producer object tree

install.layout: normal relocatable POSIX-style prefix under python/install

launcher.reason: official Android package is embedding-oriented and has no interpreter executable

loader.rule: every ELF receives one relative DT_RUNPATH from its own directory to install/lib

reference_priority: Astral python-build-standalone archive and metadata contract
official Python.org Android package bytes and BeeWare dependency topology
bounded Android adaptations selected by accepted project evidence
